questionHtml:
The graph shows Gibbs free energy of a mixture of N2O4 (g) and NO2 (g) in different proportions.

N2O4 (g) ⇌ 2NO2 (g)

Which point shows the system at equilibrium?

meta.title: The graph shows Gibbs free energy of a mixture of N2O4 (g) and NO2 (g) in different proportions. N2O4 (g) ⇌ 2NO2 (g) Which point shows the system at equilibrium?
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 1.4.4—As a reaction approaches equilibrium, ΔG becomes less negative and finally reaches zero. Perform calculations using the equation ΔG = ΔG⦵ + RT lnQ and its application to a system at equilibrium ΔG⦵ = −RT lnK.
